title: Melted Kenyan Peas Tagine
description: A solo-dinner featuring snow peas, cooked in a spicy tagine with plant-based-friendly flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until softened.
Add the red pepper flakes, cumin, and turmeric, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the snow peas and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender but still crisp.
Stir in the lemon juice and salt, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 2-3 minutes, until the snow peas are fully coated in the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Adjust seasoning as needed, and serve immediately.
Serve over rice or with flatbread, if desired.
